title: Sab's Structures Reworked
description: This mod add some structures for your world
body:
### THANK YOU FOR 6000 DOWNLOADS!!!! - Special thanks from Sab and Shall


~~**This mod will only work with** [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium/version/0.3.31+mc1.20.1)~~
## Don't worry about that anymore because i remade the entire mod without MCreator so more compatibility i guess
### View the version page for more information

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d4f19bea2f0bc03c39e5d4d0363b48191c7e7e_0.webp)
# 
This mod adds some **rare** structures to your world

Currently, the mod contains:

- 6 structures for the Jungle biome

- 8 structures for the Desert biome

- 6 structures for the Snowy biomes

- 6 structures for the Dark Forest biome

- 9 structures for the Savana biome

- 6 New structures for the Swamp biome

- 2 New structures for the Mangrove Swamp biome

- Customized loot tables


### About using the mod for Modpacks:
> Ask for permission first
